# Note overlay mode

| Field        | Value                    |
|-------------|--------------------------|
| Phase       | P5: Polish               |
| Priority    | Nice to have             |
| Status      | Not started              |
| Est. Effort | Small (1-2h)             |
| Dependencies| Core loop working        |

## Description

Detect "note" in voice input. Capture thought, append to log, don't trigger context switch. For capturing insights mid-task.
